resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def findMaxK(self, nums: List[int]) -> int:
        seen = set(nums)
        max_k = -1
        for num in nums:
            if num > 0 and -num in seen:
                max_k = max(max_k, num)
        return max_k
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Convert the list to a set for O(1) lookups, then scan once to find the largest positive whose negative counterpart exists.
